description: Trigger + expectation evals for the Customer Advocate persona. Escalate-only voice — no block authority. Adverse-action explanation quality gate per CFPB Circular 2026-03.

positive.prompt: Rewrite this denial letter so a customer at 8th-grade reading level can understand it
Does this adverse-action explanation avoid boilerplate language per CFPB Circular 2026-03?
How would you explain FICO<700 hard block to a first-time applicant?

expectations.reason: CFPB Circular 2023-03 explicitly rejects these as insufficient (verbatim citation-registry entry)
Customer Advocate has escalate-only authority; block reserved for Compliance / Risk / AML
